active.title: Full Offline PWA — Cache All Content for Offline Reading

completed.title: Project Scaffolding — init Next.js, install deps, configure

history_log.description: Design specification approved. Implementation plan created with 8 milestones. Ready to scaffold.
M1: Project Scaffolding — Next.js 16.2.6 all deps installed, git init, pnpm dev verified.
M2: Content Pipeline — moved to active on branch feat/content-pipeline. Starting with 01-extract-text.py.
M2: Content Pipeline — 22 .doc → 22 .txt → 114 markdown surah files. Pipeline scripts (01-04) written and verified. Validation PASS (114/114).
M3: Core Components — contentLoader, ClientShell, SurahCard, SurahGrid, homepage, layout with fonts, surah reader route, Sidebar, SurahNavFooter. Build passes. Branch: feat/core-components.
M4: Special Components — QuranVerse, FontSize, ContinueReading. Building Quranic verse rendering component next.

M4: Special Components — QuranVerse.tsx (verse detection + ﴿﴾ brackets + tooltip), FontSizeControl.tsx (floating slider), ContinueReading.tsx (homepage banner), readingProgress.ts (localStorage hooks), globals.css (glass, verse-bg, animate-fade-in tokens). Build passes.
M5: Search & PWA — FlexSearch index, SearchDialog, manifest, PWA icons. Branch: feat/special-components.

M5: Search & PWA — search.ts (FlexSearch Document index), 05-build-search-index.py (7213 chunks), SearchDialog.tsx (modal with highlight), manifest.ts (web app manifest), 06-generate-icons.py (192+512 icons), ClientShell integration with search toggle. Build passes.
M6: Bookmarks & Progress — lib/bookmarks.ts, BookmarkButton.tsx, ReadingProgressBar integration. Branch: feat/search-pwa.
M6: Bookmarks & Progress — lib/bookmarks.ts (CRUD), BookmarkButton.tsx (toggle with fill icon), ReadingProgressBar.tsx (fixed top progress bar), SurahContent integration. Build passes.
M7: Juz Navigation — JuzGrid.tsx, /juz/[number] route, juz toggle in Sidebar. Branch: feat/bookmarks-progress.
M7: Juz Navigation — JuzGrid.tsx (surah grid by juz), app/juz/[number]/page.tsx (30 SSG routes), Sidebar.tsx (juz header links to /juz/{n}). Build passes — 148 routes.
M8: Polish & QA — dark mode audit, responsive audit, loading states, error boundaries, accessibility, build verification, animations.

M8: Polish & QA — All subtasks done: loading/error boundaries (6 files), accessibility (ARIA labels, skip-to-content, dialog roles), prefers-reduced-motion, animate-scale-in, RTL fixes, build verification (148 routes). Project is feature-complete.
M9: Surah Reader Visual Overhaul — The Gilded Library theme applied to reader page. Branch: feat/reader-visual-overhaul.

M9: Surah Reader Visual Overhaul — All 10 subtasks done: surah header with gold separator, Amiri Quran title, styled metadata; verse rendering with gold badges + enhanced brackets; reading pane with paper feel; card-style nav footer; glass panel font control; gradient progress bar; stagger animations; custom scrollbar; dark mode refinements. Build passes (148 routes). Branch: feat/reader-visual-overhaul.

M10: Comprehensive Visual Overhaul — The Gilded Library Complete Edition. User requested visibly premium design — addressing flat background, invisible gold, no card depth, no visual drama. 15 subtasks across all 14 component files + globals.css. Branch: feat/gilded-library-complete.

M10: Comprehensive Visual Overhaul — All 15 subtasks done. globals.css: rich warm bg gradient + paper grid + gilded-card/gold utilities. page.tsx: gold gradient hero title + ornate gold decor + premium stat pills. All components: gilded-card base, gold gradient badges with sheen hover, gold accent on Sidebar/SearchDialog/JuzGrid/ContinueReading, premium SurahContent with gold-bordered pane, SurahNavFooter with gilded-card hover, FontSizeControl/ReadingProgressBar/BookmarkButton polished. Build passes (148 routes). Project at 100%.

M11: Design Audit & Polish — Created from UI/UX critique (score 22/40). 9 subtasks addressing ban violations (gradient text, side-stripe borders), feature gaps (sidebar not rendered, no bookmarks page), and polish (gold overuse, keyboard shortcuts, error pages, SVG extraction). Backlog.
M11: Design Audit & Polish — Moved from backlog to active. Branch: fix/design-audit-polish. Starting work.

M11: Design Audit & Polish — All 9 subtasks done. Fixes: gradient text ban (solid gold color), Sidebar integrated into ClientShell (mobile overlay + fixed desktop), gold overuse dialed back (hero accent + section headers only), side-stripe borders removed (full background tint), /bookmarks route built (list/delete/navigate), keyboard shortcuts (/, ArrowRight/ArrowLeft, b), error pages hardened (العودة إلى الرئيسية link), GoldDivider component extracted (3 variants). Build passes — 149 routes.

M12: Full Offline PWA — Cache All Content for Offline Reading. Backlog. 6 subtasks: runtime caching rules, offline indicator, programmatic cache-all, search data caching, offline badge + save button, full offline test.
M12: Full Offline PWA — Moved to active. Branch: feat/offline-pwa. Starting M12_001.
